from {\n        opacity: 0;\n        transform: translateY(12px);\n    }\n    to {\n        opacity: 1;\n        transform: translateY(0);\n    }\n}\n\n/* Landing Page Styles */\n.landing-content {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);\n}\n\n.landing-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.landing-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: center;\n    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28));\n    padding: 40px;\n}\n\n.landing-title {\n    color: max-width: 720px;\n}\n\n.start-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 16px 48px;\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 8px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.25);\n}\n\n.start-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.35);\n}\n\n.start-button:active {\n    transform: translateY(0);\n}\n\n/* Question Page Styles */\n.question-container {\n    background: var(--surface);\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    padding: 30px;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n}\n\n.question-title {\n    font-size: 1.6rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    text-align: center;\n}\n\n.options-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);\n    gap: 20px;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    animation: fadeInUp 240ms ease;\n}\n\n.option {\n    cursor: pointer;\n    border: 2px solid var(--border);\n    border-radius: 12px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    background: white;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06);\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n}\n\n.option:hover {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.16);\n}\n\n.option:hover img {\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n}\n\n.option.selected {\n    border-color: var(--primary);\n    border-width: 3px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(1, 129, 190, 0.3);\n}\n\n.option img {\n    order: 1;\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 240px;\n    object-fit: cover;\n    display: block;\n    transition: transform 0.3s ease;\n}\n\n.option-text {\n    order: 0;\n    padding: 14px 12px;\n    min-height: var(--option-text-height);\n    height: var(--option-text-height);\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    color: white;\n    line-height: 1.3;\n    text-align: center;\n    background: var(--primary-strong);\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n}\n\n.question-footer {\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    align-items: center;\n    gap: 15px;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n}\n\n.next-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    min-width: 140px;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.next-button:hover:not(:disabled) {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n.next-button:disabled {\n    background-color: var(--slate-300);\n    cursor: not-allowed;\n    opacity: 0.7;\n    box-shadow: none;\n}\n\n.progress-bar {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: 25px;\n    background-color: #e1e3e5;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    position: relative;\n    margin: 0 auto;\n}\n\n.progress-fill {\n    height: 100%;\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    transition: width 0.3s ease;\n    border-radius: 999px;\n    min-width: 48px;\n}\n\n.progress-text {\n    position: absolute;\n    left: 12px;\n    top: 50%;\n    transform: translateY(-50%);\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: white;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    pointer-events: none;\n    text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);\n}\n\n.progress-section {\n    margin-top: 30px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    gap: 8px;\n    width: min(360px, 100%);\n    align-items: center;\n    position: relative;\n    margin-left: auto;\n    margin-right: auto;\n}\n\n.hidden {\n    display: none !important;\n}\n\n/* Result Page Styles */\n.result-container {\n    position: relative;\n    width: 100%;\n    border-radius: 14px;\n    overflow: hidden;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);\n}\n\n.result-image {\n    width: 100%;\n    height: auto;\n    display: block;\n}\n\n.result-overlay {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: 0;\n    left: 0;\n    right: 0;\n    bottom: 0;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    justify-content: center;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    padding: 48px;\n    background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35), rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12));\n}\n\n.result-title {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 2.1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 12px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n}\n\n.result-description {\n    color: var(--primary-dark);\n    font-size: 1.15rem;\n    margin-bottom: 30px;\n    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5);\n    line-height: 1.5;\n}\n\n.restart-button {\n    background-color: var(--primary);\n    color: white;\n    border: none;\n    padding: 14px 40px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    transition: all 0.3s ease;\n    margin-top: auto;\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.22);\n}\n\n.restart-button:hover {\n    background-color: var(--primary-strong);\n    transform: translateY(-2px);\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0, 81, 127, 0.3);\n}\n\n/* Responsive Design */\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n    .options-grid {\n        grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n    }\n\n    .landing-title {\n        font-size: 1.8rem;\n    }\n\n    .result-title {\n        font-size: 1.5rem;\n    }\n\n    .question-title {\n        font-size: 1.2rem;\n    }\n\n    .landing-overlay,\n    .result-overlay {\n        padding: 20px;\n    }\n\n    /* Let text bars grow naturally on small screens to avoid clipping */\n    .option-text {\n        height: auto;\n        min-height: 88px;\n    }\n}\n\n\n.card-link{\n    color: var(--ppl-electric-orange);\n    text-decoration: none;\n}"

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Summarizing uniform option text height implementation**

- Introduced a CSS variable to enforce a uniform option text height, setting a default of 110px for consistent layout.
- Added a mobile-specific media query override allowing the height to be automatic and minimum 88px to avoid text clipping on smaller screens.
- Ran lint checks with no issues found; tests have not been executed yet.

Relevant code snippets:

```
31:89:styles.css
:root {
    --option-text-height: 110px;
}
```

```
251:266:styles.css
.option-text {
    order: 0;
    padding: 14px 12px;
    min-height: var(--option-text-height);
    height: var(--option-text-height);
    ...
}
```

```
414:441:styles.css
@media (max-width: 600px) {
    ...
    .option-text {
        height: auto;
        min-height: 88px;
    }
}
```</details></think>

---

Set a uniform header height for all option cards using a new `--option-text-height` variable so the top bars line up and no extra gap appears below shorter text. On small screens the bar height now reverts to auto with a lower minimum to avoid clipping. Lints are clean.

```
31:89:styles.css
:root {
    --brand-50: #E3F0F6;
    ...
    --option-text-height: 110px;
}
```

```
251:266:styles.css
.option-text {
    order: 0;
    padding: 14px 12px;
    min-height: var(--option-text-height);
    height: var(--option-text-height);
    font-size: 1rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: white;
    line-height: 1.3;
    text-align: center;
    background: var(--primary-strong);
    text-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}
```

```
414:441:styles.css
@media (max-width: 600px) {
    ...
    .option-text {
        height: auto;
        min-height: 88px;
    }
}
```

Tests not run (CSS-only change).
